Title: Submit a valid book review
Preconditions: User is on a book detail page with the bookReview modal open, authenticated user
Steps: 1. Click "View Reviews" on a book card | 2. Click "Write a Review" button | 3. Enter reviewer name "John Doe" | 4. Select rating "5 - Excellent" | 5. Enter comment "Great read!" | 6. Click "Submit Review"
Test Data: Reviewer Name: John Doe, Rating: 5, Comment: Great read!
Expected Result: Review is created successfully, success toast is shown, form closes, review list refreshes showing the new review

Title: Display existing reviews for a book
Preconditions: Book has at least 2 existing reviews with ratings, comments, and reviewer names
Steps: 1. Navigate to the book library | 2. Click "View Reviews" on a book that has reviews | 3. Observe the reviews modal
Expected Result: Modal opens showing: book name in header, average rating with star icons, review count, individual reviews with reviewer name, rating (x/5), formatted date, and comment text

Title: End-to-end submit and display review flow
Preconditions: User is on the bookList page with books displayed, no prior reviews on a chosen book
Steps: 1. Click "View Reviews" on a book with no reviews | 2. Verify "No reviews yet" message is shown | 3. Click "Write a Review" | 4. Fill in name "Alice", rating 4, comment "Enjoyable book" | 5. Submit | 6. Verify success message | 7. Verify the review now appears in the list | 8. Verify average rating shows 4.0
Test Data: Name: Alice, Rating: 4, Comment: Enjoyable book
Expected Result: No reviews message initially, then after submission: success toast, review appears with correct details, average rating shows 4.0, review count shows 1 review

Title: Submit review with minimum valid inputs
Preconditions: bookReview modal is open with form toggled
Steps: 1. Click "Write a Review" | 2. Enter reviewer name "A" (single char) | 3. Select rating "1 - Poor" | 4. Enter comment "OK" (short comment) | 5. Click "Submit Review"
Expected Result: Review is created successfully with all provided values stored correctly

Title: Average rating calculation with multiple reviews
Steps: 1. Navigate to book with ratings 1, 3, and 5 | 2. Click "View Reviews" | 3. Observe the average rating display
Expected Result: Average rating displayed as 3.0, star icons reflect 3 out of 5 filled, review count shows "3 reviews"

Title: Submit review with empty reviewer name
Preconditions: bookReview modal is open with form toggled
Steps: 1. Click "Write a Review" | 2. Leave reviewer name empty | 3. Select rating "3 - Good" | 4. Enter comment "Test comment" | 5. Click "Submit Review"
Expected Result: Error message "Please fill in all fields." is displayed, review is NOT created

Title: Submit review with no rating selected
Preconditions: bookReview modal is open with form toggled
Steps: 1. Click "Write a Review" | 2. Enter reviewer name "Bob" | 3. Do NOT select a rating | 4. Enter comment "Test" | 5. Click "Submit Review"
Expected Result: Error message "Please fill in all fields." is displayed, review is NOT created

Title: Submit review with empty comment
Preconditions: bookReview modal is open with form toggled
Steps: 1. Click "Write a Review" | 2. Enter reviewer name "Carol" | 3. Select rating "4 - Very Good" | 4. Leave comment empty | 5. Click "Submit Review"
Expected Result: Error message "Please fill in all fields." is displayed, review is NOT created

Title: Display reviews for a book with zero reviews
Preconditions: Book exists with no Review__c records
Steps: 1. Click "View Reviews" on a book with no reviews | 2. Observe the modal content
Expected Result: Modal shows "No reviews yet for this book. Be the first to write one!" message, no average rating or review list is shown, "Write a Review" button is visible

Title: Toggle review form open and closed
Steps: 1. Click "Write a Review" (form opens) | 2. Verify form fields appear | 3. Click "Cancel" button | 4. Verify form disappears | 5. Verify button label changes back to "Write a Review"
Expected Result: Form toggles visibility correctly, button label switches between "Write a Review" and "Cancel", button variant switches between brand and neutral

Title: Review display with single review shows singular text
Steps: 1. Navigate to a book with exactly 1 review | 2. Click "View Reviews" | 3. Check review count text
Expected Result: Review count text displays "Based on 1 review" (singular, not plural)

Title: Verify Oktawave branding on review modal
Preconditions: bookReview modal is open with reviews
Steps: 1. Open a book review modal | 2. Inspect header background color | 3. Inspect average rating color | 4. Inspect review-item left border | 5. Inspect form heading color when form is open
Expected Result: Header background is #2DB5DA, average rating text color is #2DB5DA, review items have left border of #2DB5DA, form heading color is #2DB5DA, secondary text colors are #939598

Title: Apex createReview rejects invalid rating value
Steps: 1. Call BookController.createReview with rating value '6' | 2. Observe the exception
Expected Result: AuraHandledException is thrown with message "Rating must be between 1 and 5"

Title: Close modal dispatches event correctly
Preconditions: bookReview modal is open, parent bookList component listening
Steps: 1. Click "View Reviews" on a book card | 2. Observe modal opens | 3. Click "Close" button in modal footer | 4. Verify modal closes and bookList selectedBookId resets
Expected Result: closereview custom event is dispatched, modal is removed from DOM, bookList component clears selectedBookId
